checks_reviewed.command: git diff -- target English docs and git status --short
checks_reviewed.evidence: Read-only rerun observed no tracked diff for target docs because the analysis package is untracked; verification-command-output.md:65-75 records the same scoped status. Broader package.json drift is residual risk only per request.

residual_risks: Out-of-scope package.json drift remains in the worktree: the validate script no longer removes .claude, only .claude-state. This is not a finding for this review because the request explicitly excluded package.json drift from findings.
Korean mirrors are intentionally pending until this English GO and still require their own mirror update/review before bilingual final completion.

Local validation does not prove live Stitch, Confluence, OpenClaw/OrbStack, mobile-mcp, EAS, Railway, Jira, GitHub branch protection, or store behavior; those remain external proof or human-gated surfaces under PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT.md and REPO_OPERATIONS.md.
